copy.clear_well_evidenced_knowledge_gap_in_on: Clear, well-evidenced knowledge gap in one topic.
copy.moderate_difficulty_in_one_topic_needs_f: Moderate difficulty in one topic - needs focused practice, not yet a clear gap.
copy.decent_but_not_yet_fully_mastered_accura: Decent, but not yet fully mastered, accuracy - partial stability.
copy.high_stable_accuracy_over_adequate_volum: High, stable accuracy over adequate volume - mastery.
copy.some_practice_but_not_enough_to_call_a_d: Some practice, but not enough to call a direction yet (more than initial_data, less than a full evidence threshold).
copy.too_little_practice_q_4_or_engine_explic: Too little practice (q<=4, or engine explicitly withholds) to say anything about a pattern.
copy.both_a_positive_dominance_signal_and_a_r: Both a positive-dominance signal and a repeated-mistake signal detected in the same topic window.
copy.two_or_more_actionable_gap_topics_in_thi: Two or more actionable-gap topics in this subject.
copy.exactly_one_actionable_gap_topic_in_this: Exactly one actionable-gap topic in this subject.
copy.no_actionable_gaps_at_least_one_stable_t: No actionable gaps; at least one stable topic.
copy.no_topics_with_usable_evidence_in_this_s: No topics with usable evidence in this subject yet.
copy.cannot_conclude_yet_insufficient_readine: Cannot conclude yet / insufficient readiness or confidence - most cautious envelope.
copy.early_signal_only_first_direction_formin: Early signal only - first direction forming, still needs more practice.
copy.reasonable_working_direction_wants_to_se: Reasonable working direction; wants to see it repeat before calling it stable.
copy.direction_looks_stable_across_the_period: Direction looks stable across the period; keep up routine practice.
copy.highest_confidence_stable_mastery_envelo: Highest-confidence stable/mastery envelope - eligible for a graduated recommendation step.
